acceptance.item: digital output labels — CN6 is DQCOM / DQ1 / DQ2
acceptance.note: Graph asserted DO1/DO2 (+ terminals CN6:DO1/CN6:DO2) for the printed DQ1/DQ2 (DQCOM correct). Caught by exact_label_mismatch + confident_misread. Verified on NVE97896-02 sheet 1/2.

acceptance.item: PC/- is DC-bus, not part of either valid brake-resistor circuit
acceptance.note: Graph merged DC-bus PC/- (and PA/+) into the S1&S2 brake path. S1&S2 brake = CN10:PBe<->CN10:PB; S3 brake = CN9:PA/+<->CN8:PB; PC/- is DC-bus, in neither. Caught by incompatible_functional_path. Confirmed by NVE97896-02 + Install. Manual NVE61069.06 p.117.

Graph carries unqualified duplicate ids M, CN9:PA/+, CN9:PC/-. CN9 is identical across frames, so these are the SAME terminal and need de-duplication (NOT variant-qualification). Caught by duplicate_identifier.

acceptance.item: off-page references are electrical, not pagination
acceptance.note: Graph modeled the footer '1/2' as an off_page_reference '2/2'. Caught by off_page_from_pagination.

acceptance.item: RS422 on CN3/ENC is legitimate (NOT a defect)
acceptance.note: CN3 supports 'Digital encoder 5V RS422 A/B/I' per Install. Manual NVE61069.06 p.132. RS422 is Schneider's shared differential standard across CN3/CN4/CN5. Correctly NOT gated (D1 reversed 2026-07-14; incorrect_connector_ownership removed).
Graph used AI2+/AI2- (a sign/order variant of the SAME terminal). NOT a graph defect; correctly not gated. The LLM judge false-flag is fixed in PR4 §10.6.

hard_failures: exact_label_mismatch: printed DQ1/DQ2 read as DO1/DO2
confident_misread: DO1/DO2/CN6:DO1/CN6:DO2 asserted with structural confidence
incompatible_functional_path: DC-bus PC/- (and PA/+) merged into the S1&S2 brake loop
duplicate_identifier: unqualified duplicate M / CN9:PA/+ / CN9:PC/- (same terminal — de-dup)
off_page_from_pagination: footer '1/2' modeled as off-page ref '2/2'
removed_after_primary_source_review_2026: incorrect_connector_ownership (D1) — CONTRADICTED: CN3 legitimately supports 5V RS422 A/B/I (Install. Manual NVE61069.06 p.132).
variant_crossover — redundant with incompatible_functional_path; CN9 is not frame-variable (PB location varies CN10 vs CN8, not CN9).
dangling_reference (CN3) — CN3 is a real connector; require_refs_resolve=false. A generic non-gating reference diagnostic may run elsewhere.
summary: The defective ATV340 graph reads its tags with decent accuracy (score ~74/100, grader-derived) yet is structurally UNSAFE to import. FIVE deterministic gates fire (exact_label_mismatch, confident_misread, duplicate_identifier, off_page_from_pagination, incompatible_functional_path), each confirmed against the rendered NVE97896-02 sheet 1/2 and/or the official Install. Manual NVE61069.06 (see evidence_manifest.json). This is the negative calibration anchor: good prose (~74) does NOT imply a trustworthy graph (import_verdict=FAIL). D1 (RS422/CN3) was REVERSED after primary-source verification and its blocker removed, along with the redundant variant_crossover and the non-defect dangling_reference — the reduced set independently preserves FAIL. truth_status=draft_llm_authored: awaiting Mike's review-and-freeze (PRD §10.7).
